evals.prompt: The sync agent isn't pushing contacts. Help me debug it.
evals.expected_output: Debugging steps: check logs, verify credentials, test health endpoint
expectations: Suggests verifying CRM_URL and CRM_API_KEY in the plist
Suggests testing the health endpoint with curl

evals.prompt: Add a new field 'email' to the sync agent so it pushes contact emails to the CRM
evals.expected_output: Updated crm_sync_agent.py to include email in the push payload
expectations: The get_local_contacts() SQL query includes email if the column exists
The push payload includes the email field
